description: In pipeline.ts:158-159, TagInventoryUpdated (an internal Curate event, not a PublicDomainEvent) is unsafely cast via `event as unknown as PublicDomainEvent` and published to the public event bus. This bypasses TypeScript's type safety: TagInventoryUpdated { kind: 'tag-inventory-updated' } is not a variant of PublicDomainEvent, so publishing it through the typed event bus is a type-level lie. The double cast (as unknown as PublicDomainEvent) defeats the exhaustiveness guarantees that PROP-005 claims to enforce. If any downstream consumer does a switch over PublicDomainEvent.kind, this untyped event will fall through to the default/never branch.
